context: Agent was asked to decompose a branch where all commits touch the same component and one proposed split would leave a failing test in transit. Evaluate whether the agent correctly declines.

checklist.name: explicitly-declines-decomposition
checklist.description: Agent clearly states it will not proceed with decomposing the branch, not just hedges or asks for more information

checklist.name: cites-same-component-reason
checklist.description: Agent identifies that all commits touch the same component (NotificationService) and explains this makes decomposition add friction without value

checklist.name: cites-failing-test-reason
checklist.description: Agent identifies that splitting c5d6e7 (removal) from d7e8f9 (test update) would leave a PR with a failing test suite

checklist.name: no-grouping-table-produced
checklist.description: Agent does not produce a decomposition proposal table or branch plan — it declines before that stage

checklist.name: offers-constructive-alternative
checklist.description: Agent suggests a constructive path forward: open as a single focused PR, or ask reviewers to review commit-by-commit using the git log
